title: senecio rangei
intro: Senecio rangei, also known as the 'Ragwort', is a plant species native to Central and South America, and is a member of the daisy family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Senecio rangei lie in its pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of the plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing. Senecio rangei can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
